title: Here’s another look at Samsung’s upcoming Galaxy watches.
summary: Marketing materials for the Galaxy Watch 9 and Watch Ultra 2 have been shared online by leaker Evan Blass. The Galaxy Watch 9 reportedly features a Snapdragon Wear Elite chip, and is shown in three color options.
caption: output/2026-07-20/here-s-another-look-at-samsung-s-upcoming-galaxy-watches.txt
